description_long: This object is a decorative potted flower arrangement featuring a round, white and black ceramic pot labeled 'Flower' on its front. The plant consists of several slender, branching stems that rise from the pot, each adorned with small, vibrant blossoms in shades of red, yellow, and green. The flowers are clustered densely at the upper portions of the stems, with petals arranged in a somewhat radial pattern and accented by orange-tipped buds. Large, broad, dark green leaves emerge from the base, spreading outward and providing a lush backdrop to the more delicate floral elements. The pot has a smooth, glossy finish, while the plant components appear to be made of synthetic materials, likely plastic or fabric, mimicking the texture and color of real foliage and flowers. This arrangement is suitable for placement on tables, windowsills, or urban public spaces as an ornamental feature.
description: A decorative potted flower arrangement with colorful blossoms and broad green leaves in a glossy, labeled ceramic pot. The plant features branching stems with clustered, vibrant flowers and a lush, artificial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Flower' label on the pot, with the main cluster of blossoms and two large leaves extending to the sides.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the pot and the spread of the leaves, with the branching stems and flowers visible from a different perspective.
description_view_2: Another front-facing view with the 'Flower' label visible, showing the dense arrangement of blossoms and the symmetry of the leaves.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the pot and the arrangement of leaves and stems, with fewer blossoms visible compared to the front.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration around the center of each flower, with some overlapping and layering, creating a whorled appearance typical of many ornamental flowers.
